markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align 2026 content strategy with Vallarta Adventures' priorities and market challenges.](https://fathom.video/share/K-X1eJBxSmh4y__-PZ6Rb3WTrtU5wdNp?tab=summary&timestamp=81.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Market Downturn:** Vallarta sales are down \~30% YoY, with October being the lowest month. This is a market-wide issue, not a content performance failure.](https://fathom.video/share/K-X1eJBxSmh4y__-PZ6Rb3WTrtU5wdNp?tab=summary&timestamp=127.0)
  - [**Organic Growth:** Content is working. Organic + Direct traffic share grew from 43% to 61% YoY, despite a 32% drop in Fathom revenue.](https://fathom.video/share/K-X1eJBxSmh4y__-PZ6Rb3WTrtU5wdNp?tab=summary&timestamp=431.0)
  - [**2026 Strategy:** Shift from volume to quality. Focus on refreshing top-performing content, consolidating articles, and building pillar pages to strengthen the content stack.](https://fathom.video/share/K-X1eJBxSmh4y__-PZ6Rb3WTrtU5wdNp?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
  - [**New Initiative:** Optimize underperforming tour pages, starting with those outside the top 3 organic search results, to improve conversion at the point of sale.](https://fathom.video/share/K-X1eJBxSmh4y__-PZ6Rb3WTrtU5wdNp?tab=summary&timestamp=1548.0)

## Topics

### 2025 Performance & Market Context

  - [**Sales Downturn:** Vallarta sales are down \~30% YoY, with October as the lowest month.](https://fathom.video/share/K-X1eJBxSmh4y__-PZ6Rb3WTrtU5wdNp?tab=summary&timestamp=127.0)
  - [**Market-Wide Factors:**](https://fathom.video/share/K-X1eJBxSmh4y__-PZ6Rb3WTrtU5wdNp?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)
      - [**Travel Alerts:** A new Canadian travel alert for Jalisco & Nayarit, amplified by media blogs, negatively impacts traveler perception.](https://fathom.video/share/K-X1eJBxSmh4y__-PZ6Rb3WTrtU5wdNp?tab=summary&timestamp=554.0)
      - [**Negative Press:** A US Transportation Safety Board (TSB) cancellation of flights to Mexico City's AIFA airport creates general consumer anxiety about travel to Mexico.](https://fathom.video/share/K-X1eJBxSmh4y__-PZ6Rb3WTrtU5wdNp?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
      - [**Competitive Shifts:** Search intent is rising for other destinations (e.g., La Paz), indicating a shift in traveler interest.](https://fathom.video/share/K-X1eJBxSmh4y__-PZ6Rb3WTrtU5wdNp?tab=summary&timestamp=1102.0)
  - [**Content Performance:**](https://fathom.video/share/K-X1eJBxSmh4y__-PZ6Rb3WTrtU5wdNp?tab=summary&timestamp=296.0)
      - [**Strong Organic Growth:** Organic + Direct traffic share grew from 43% (Sept 2024) to 61% (Sept 2025), showing content is successfully capturing top-of-funnel interest.](https://fathom.video/share/K-X1eJBxSmh4y__-PZ6Rb3WTrtU5wdNp?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
      - [**Fathom Revenue Drop:** Fathom revenue fell 32% YoY ($312k → $200k), a primary driver of the overall sales decline.](https://fathom.video/share/K-X1eJBxSmh4y__-PZ6Rb3WTrtU5wdNp?tab=summary&timestamp=431.0)

### 2026 Content Strategy Shift

  - [**Phase 2 Focus:** Shift from high-volume publishing to quality and refinement.](https://fathom.video/share/K-X1eJBxSmh4y__-PZ6Rb3WTrtU5wdNp?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
  - [**Key Initiatives:**](https://fathom.video/share/K-X1eJBxSmh4y__-PZ6Rb3WTrtU5wdNp?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
      - [**Content Refresh:** Update top-performing articles (e.g., "Is it safe?", "Hurricane season") to maintain freshness for AI search and user relevance.](https://fathom.video/share/K-X1eJBxSmh4y__-PZ6Rb3WTrtU5wdNp?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
      - [**Consolidation:** Redirect redundant articles to strengthen key pages.](https://fathom.video/share/K-X1eJBxSmh4y__-PZ6Rb3WTrtU5wdNp?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
      - [**Pillar Pages:** Build new destination landing pages (e.g., Marietas) to provide a comprehensive, non-blog perspective.](https://fathom.video/share/K-X1eJBxSmh4y__-PZ6Rb3WTrtU5wdNp?tab=summary&timestamp=1204.0)
  - [**Strategic Partnership:** A new collaboration with the Puerto Vallarta Tourism Bureau (PVTB) will drive mutual growth through content and influencer exchanges.](https://fathom.video/share/K-X1eJBxSmh4y__-PZ6Rb3WTrtU5wdNp?tab=summary&timestamp=862.0)

### New Initiative: Tour Page Optimization

  - [**Goal:** Improve conversion at the point of sale by optimizing underperforming tour pages.](https://fathom.video/share/K-X1eJBxSmh4y__-PZ6Rb3WTrtU5wdNp?tab=summary&timestamp=1548.0)
  - [**Prioritization:** Target pages outside the top 3 organic search results, as top-ranking pages are already performing well.](https://fathom.video/share/K-X1eJBxSmh4y__-PZ6Rb3WTrtU5wdNp?tab=summary&timestamp=1634.0)
  - [**Execution:**](https://fathom.video/share/K-X1eJBxSmh4y__-PZ6Rb3WTrtU5wdNp?tab=summary&timestamp=1548.0)
      - [**Content Focus:** Add rich, keyword-dense details (e.g., specific marine life, reef names) to improve SEO and user engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/K-X1eJBxSmh4y__-PZ6Rb3WTrtU5wdNp?tab=summary&timestamp=1548.0)
      - [**Information Gathering:** Isabel will provide a list of questions for each tour to help the content team source details from internal experts.](https://fathom.video/share/K-X1eJBxSmh4y__-PZ6Rb3WTrtU5wdNp?tab=summary&timestamp=1548.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Isabel:**](https://fathom.video/share/K-X1eJBxSmh4y__-PZ6Rb3WTrtU5wdNp?tab=summary&timestamp=1548.0)
      - [Prioritize tour pages for optimization based on organic search rankings (outside the top 3).](https://fathom.video/share/K-X1eJBxSmh4y__-PZ6Rb3WTrtU5wdNp?tab=summary&timestamp=1634.0)
      - [Provide a list of questions for each prioritized tour to facilitate information gathering.](https://fathom.video/share/K-X1eJBxSmh4y__-PZ6Rb3WTrtU5wdNp?tab=summary&timestamp=1548.0)
  - [**Mariana:**](https://fathom.video/share/K-X1eJBxSmh4y__-PZ6Rb3WTrtU5wdNp?tab=summary&timestamp=1548.0)
      - [Conduct a tour page analysis to identify optimization opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/K-X1eJBxSmh4y__-PZ6Rb3WTrtU5wdNp?tab=summary&timestamp=1634.0)
      - [Implement the Phase 2 content strategy (refresh, consolidate, pillar pages).](https://fathom.video/share/K-X1eJBxSmh4y__-PZ6Rb3WTrtU5wdNp?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
  - [**Saul:**](https://fathom.video/share/K-X1eJBxSmh4y__-PZ6Rb3WTrtU5wdNp?tab=summary&timestamp=1723.0)
      - [Share quarterly destination research findings with the team.](https://fathom.video/share/K-X1eJBxSmh4y__-PZ6Rb3WTrtU5wdNp?tab=summary&timestamp=1723.0)
